global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with bold text and shapes.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with new hits available weekly.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large green background shape with a smooth, rounded edge that occupies the center of the ad.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A slightly smaller white overlay shape with a rectangular form, positioned centrally within the green background.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom of the ad, filled with a light color.

elements.label: Another small circle
elements.description: Another small circular shape, similar to the previous one, positioned next to it.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large black text stating 'Stream the hype New hits every week' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Stream the hype New hits every week

elements.label: Call to action text
elements.description: A smaller black text at the bottom reading '€9.99 Claim reward', designed to attract attention.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The brand name 'FluxStream' in large, bold text at the top of the ad, colored in a contrasting shade.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' in a simple font, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, promoting streaming service.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centrally positioned, the logo is at the top, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Stream the hype New hits every week, €9.99 Claim reward, FluxStream, UGC
